MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Brenda Hucherson.
Attorney Paul Arshawsky appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Shaurice Butler is present.
Attorney John Weinstein representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Denis Rice, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of July-23-2012 is vacated. (D501)
